name: Bug report
about: Something Suture does that it should not, or crashes unexpectedly
labels: bug

```
uv run suture --version
```

```
python --version
```

```bash
# paste the exact command here
```

<!-- What did you expect Suture to do? -->

## Actual behaviour

<!-- What happened instead? Include any error message or traceback. -->

## JSON output

If safe to share, paste the output of:

```bash
suture doctor --json
```

> **Do not paste real secrets, API keys, passwords, or sensitive environment
> variable values.** Replace actual values with placeholders like `MY_VAR=`
> before sharing.
